attributes.Sql Query:

FROM $$STGDB.WI_SALES_ORDER_V1_OPL WSOV
WHERE DML_TYPE='I'
AND NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOV WHERE 
NSOV.SALES_ORDER_KEY=WSOV.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND NSOV.SS_CD='OPL')
